name: RTX Corp
summary: PART I General RTX Corporation is an aerospace and defense company that provides advanced systems and services for commercial, military, and government customers worldwide. The terms we, us, our, the Company, and RTX mean RTX Corporation and its subsidiaries, unless the context indicates another meaning.
